sources.page_title: IK FOAM Pro 2 - Profesional Sprayers - Foam Sprayers
sources.cleaned_content:
# Foam Sprayer IK FOAM Pro 2

The IK FOAM Pro 2 professional sprayer has been manufactured for the generation of dry and durable foam. Designed to be used with chemical agents with surfactant properties.

IK Foam Pro 2 provides the user with a dense, permanent foam that is ideal for professional cleaning, sanitation and disinfection work, HVAC system cleaning, vehicle washing and detailing, bike cleaning as well as for the disinfection of food processing areas and industrial kitchens.

HOW TO MAKE A PERFECT FOAM

- Follow the dilution ratio recommended by the foaming agent you are using.
- Pressurize the sprayer until the safety valve pops out.
- Make sure the felts are clean.

![image](https://images.goizper.com/big/default/81676/81676-0.jpg)

Reference IK FOAM Pro 2: 81676

Sectors in which to use IK FOAM Pro 2: Cleaning and disinfection, Automotive and detailing

Products with which to use IK FOAM Pro 2: Foaming agents.

Functional information:
- Translucent tank with level indicator
- Base for greater stability
- Large opening easy filling
- Safety lock
- Safety valve with depressurisation option
- Protective sleeve for valve chamber
- Ability to identify content via coloured caps
- Easy assembly and taking apart for cleaning and maintenance, tool free

Scope of use:
![image](https://images.goizper.com/original/en/81676/81676-1.jpg)
![image](https://images.goizper.com/original/default/81676/81676-2.jpg)
![image](https://images.goizper.com/original/default/81676/81676-3.jpg)
![image](https://images.goizper.com/original/default/81676/81676-4.jpg)
![image](https://images.goizper.com/original/default/81676/81676-5.jpg)
![image](https://images.goizper.com/original/default/81676/81676-6.jpg)
![image](https://images.goizper.com/original/default/81676/81676-7.jpg)

Technical information:
- Valve: Tared at 3 bar / 43,5 psi despresurizable
- Standard nozzles: Special nozzle with fan-type foam
- Useful capacity: 1,25 L - 42 Oz.
- Total capacity: 1,9 L - 64 Oz.
- Gross weight: 0,7 kg - 1,54 lbs.
- Net weight: 0,56 kg - 1,23 lbs.

Chemical product table: https://www.iksprayers.com/en/chemical-product-table
Instructions PDF: https://static.iksprayers.com/media/handbooks/iksprayers/en/81676.pdf
Catalog PDF: https://static.iksprayers.com/media/catalogdownload/iksprayers/en/81676.pdf

## IK FOAM Pro 2 professional spraying

The IK FOAM Pro 2 handheld sprayer is a foam generator designed for cleaning tasks in various sectors.
It has a wide filling mouth, ergonomic design, safety valve set at 3 bar (depressurisable), base for greater stability, coloured caps to identify the contents of the tank, safety lock on the opening and closing system.
The sprayer is equipped with three mixers (orange, grey and green) which allow to vary the type of foam by choosing between wet, intermediate or dry foam.
With the use of the foam we manage to increase the contact time between the chemical and the surface to be cleaned, cleaning fabrics and upholstery avoiding excessive soaking which generates the appearance of fungus and bacteria, and finally having greater visual control of the sprayed surface.
The easy manual assembly and disassembly of the IK Foam Pro 2, allows a complete maintenance without the use of tools.

Accessories:
- Content identifier IK 1,5/2
- IK Pro lid

sources.page_title: IK FOAM Pro 2+ | IK Sprayer Hand Pump Pressure Foam Sprayer
sources.cleaned_content:
# IK FOAM Pro 2+ Pump Up Foamer

Brand: IK Sprayers
Product code: 81678

Price: 35.95
In Stock

Product Images:
![image](/DynamicImages/16870-700-700/ik-foam-pro-2-.png)
![image](/DynamicImages/16871-700-700/ik-foam-pro-2-.png)
![image](/DynamicImages/16872-700-700/ik-foam-pro-2-.png)
![image](/DynamicImages/16873-700-700/ik-foam-pro-2-.png)
![image](/DynamicImages/16875-700-700/ik-foam-pro-2-.png)

Selected Type: Pump Up Foamer

## The Foam Pro Just Got Better

Pre Wash is an essential part of any car cleaning routine and Snow Foam normally sits at the top of the tree of most used pre wash types. The issue is to generate a thick enough foam to stick to the car, you normally need to have a pressure washer and a foaming lance. Not with the IK Foam Pro 2+, just add the product to the bottle (follow the bottle's dilution ratios), pump it up by hand or pressurise with a pump and you have snow foam.

The IK Foam Pro 2+ is a small upgrade from the original Foam 1.5 but with a large overall improvement. The standard features found on both include, a manual pump up handle, a wide filling mouth and a safety value set to 3 bar, so you can't over pressurise and break the seals. The translucent tank for checking quantity of liquid. Where the Pro 2+ is such an upgrade is in the finer details.

- A none wobble base to reduce chance of knocking it over in use.
- Measurements up the side to accurate dilutions
- Grip features on the bottle so no more slipping bottle.
- Additional caps for identifying products.
- Large capacity for longer run time and more product
- Safety lock on the handle.
- Pro+ also comes with an air value compared to the Pro for additional pressure.

This fantastic solution especially for the quick weekend wash allows you to remove the light dust or dirt without unpacking all your car wash equipment. Spray the foam on the car and just rinse off with a hose. This small quick wash could stop the build up of traffic film between major washes and because there is no direct contact, no swirls!

IK Foam Pro 2+ provides the user with a dense and permanent foam ideal for professional cleaning, sanitation and disinfection, HVAC system cleaning, vehicle washing and detailing, as well as for the disinfection of food processing areas and industrial kitchens.

Finally, the IK Foam Pro 2+ Pump Up Foamer has 3 types of mixers:
- Orange - Wet Foam
- Grey - Intermediate Foam
- Green - Dry Foam

This gives you even more control over the type of foam required for the different parts of your car. A dryer foam may be more suitable to interiors or engine bays where you don't require as much water or a wet foam for areas where you need the foam to seep into every crevice.

Features:
- Valve - 3-bar setting with automatic pressure release option
- Nozzles - Special nozzle with fan-type foam
- Useful capacity - 1.25L
- Total capacity - 1.95L
- Gross weight - 0.7 kg
- Net weight - 0.56 kg

IK Sprayer Chemical Table: /documents/IK-Sprayer-Chemical-Table.pdf
IK Sprayer Instruction Booklet: /documents/IK-Instruction-Booklets/81678-INS.pdf
IK Sprayer Catalogue: /documents/IK-Instruction-Booklets/81678-CAT.pdf

No reviews yet.

![image](https://media.diy.com/is/image/KingfisherDigital/matabi-81676-ik-foam-pro-2-handheld-sprayer-1-9-litre-mtb81676~8414685102089_04c_MP?$MOB_PREV$&$width=600&$height=600)

## Product information

Discover the Matabi iK FOAM Pro 2 Handheld Sprayer, designed for optimal performance and ease of use. This ergonomic sprayer features a generous 1.9-litre total capacity and a wide mouth for effortless filling. Its stable wide base ensures secure placement during use, providing you with peace of mind. With a safety valve set at 3 bar and a locking mechanism on the opening system, safety is prioritized in every spray. Color-coded features make it easy to identify the contents of the tank, enhancing your cleaning efficiency.

Equipped with three interchangeable mixers in orange, grey, and green, this sprayer allows you to customize your foam type - whether you need wet, intermediate, or dry foam. The foam application improves the contact time between cleaning chemicals and surfaces, making it perfect for cleaning fabrics and upholstery without excessive soaking, thereby preventing mold and bacteria growth. Enjoy greater visual control as you spray, ensuring thorough coverage.

Maintenance is a breeze with the Matabi iK FOAM Pro 2, thanks to its tool-free assembly and disassembly. Whether you're a professional cleaner or a homeowner, this handheld sprayer is an essential addition to your cleaning arsenal. Upgrade your cleaning routine today!

Guarantee - Statutory
